notes: buildx bake of the integration-tests target failed at build step #72 [nydus 1/2] because the `RUN wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/...` line at Dockerfile:336 received HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway from github.com. flaky_or_transient = true (transient github outage; the Dockerfile itself is correct). Failure block sits at lines ~1853-1901 of 3979 (signal_position=middle, ~48%) — meaningful because tail-200 won't catch it. Source URL: https://github.com/moby/buildkit/actions/runs/25457465464/job/74691198803. Imported on 2026-05-06; raw.log normalized from `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` output by stripping the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
root_cause_summary: The `docker buildx bake integration-tests` build of moby/buildkit's frontend integration test target failed at build step `#72 [nydus 1/2]`, where `RUN wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/v2.4.0/nydus-static-v2.4.0-linux-amd64.tgz` (Dockerfile:336) hit HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway from github.com and exited with code 1. BuildKit reported `failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget ..." did not complete successfully: exit code: 1`, the buildx bake action emitted `##[error]buildx bake failed with: ...`, and the job exited 1. This is a transient external network failure (github.com 502 from the nydus release CDN), not a Dockerfile or wget bug; the build would succeed on retry once GitHub returns 200.

notes: Single failed pytest functional test in tests/functional/test_truststore.py::test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]. Surface error is `AssertionError: Script returned code: 1` but underlying root cause is GitHub returning 502 Bad Gateway when pip downloads https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip. The test was retried 3 times by pytest-rerunfailures before final fail; flaky_or_transient = true. Source URL: https://github.com/pypa/pip/actions/runs/25304420764/job/74177317281. Imported on 2026-05-06; raw.log normalized from `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` output by stripping the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
root_cause_summary: The pytest functional test `tests/functional/test_truststore.py::test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]` fails because GitHub returns repeated 502 Bad Gateway errors when pip tries to download `https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip`. The pip subprocess exits with code 1, the test framework asserts on exit code 0, and `AssertionError: Script returned code: 1` is raised. The test was retried 3 times by pytest-rerunfailures before the final fail; the root cause is transient external infrastructure (GitHub 502s), not a bug in pip or in the truststore code path the test name suggests.

notes: Single-test failure in pnpm/pnpm CI. Jest test suite test/config/get.ts has 1 failing test inside 485 total tests; failure is a string-equality assertion (expected vs received differs by trailing slash). Source URL: https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm/actions/runs/25437799581/job/74621031900. Imported via tools/import_case_skeleton.py on 2026-05-06; raw.log was normalized from `gh run view --log` output by stripping the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
root_cause_summary: The jest test `pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc` in `test/config/get.ts:32` fails because `pnpm config get @my-org:registry` returns the registry URL with a trailing slash (`https://my-org.registry.example.com/`) while the test expects it without one (`https://my-org.registry.example.com`). The single failing assertion (1 of 485 tests) drives the pnpm CI test job to exit code 1.
